codeReview.summary: Implementation adds authenticated interrupt and shell-kill routes to the gateway test server with appropriate SSE fanout and 404 handling, plus comprehensive tests covering success, no-op interrupt, unknown shell, and auth enforcement. The mock session manager now supports cancelProcessing/killShell to back the new behavior.

summary: Reviewed gateway-interrupt-kill: routes, mock session manager updates, and tests align with expected behaviors and auth/SSE requirements. No issues found.
